activeReviewBanner.heading: Your active review
activeReviewBanner.selfNotStarted: Self-review not started — open to get started
activeReviewBanner.managerCompleted: Manager review complete — acknowledge to close out
activeReviewBanner.inProgress: Track self-review, peer nominations, and feedback

dashboard.noContributionDataHint: Click "Generate Summary" to analyze your GitHub activity

exampleGoal.title: Improve API response times by 50%
exampleGoal.keyResults: {count, plural, one {# key result} other {# key results}}
exampleGoal.prsLinked: {count, plural, one {# PR linked} other {# PRs linked}}

dashboard.failedToGenerateSummary: Failed to generate summary. Please try again.
dashboard.exampleGoalPreview: This is what your goals will look like. Start tracking your progress now.
dashboard.aiInsightPreview: Connect your GitHub account to unlock AI-generated contribution narratives that synthesize your commits, PRs, and code reviews into compelling summaries.

features.smartGoalsDesc: Set Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound goals with key results tracking.
features.feedback360Desc: Request anonymous peer reviews using the COIN framework (Context, Observation, Impact, Next Steps).
features.aiSummariesDesc: Auto-generate contribution narratives from your GitHub commits, PRs, and code reviews.

goals.title: My Goals
goals.description: Track your SMART goals and key results
goals.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This action cannot be undone.

confirmComplete.title: Complete this goal?
confirmComplete.description: This goal will be marked as completed and locked from further updates.
confirmComplete.descriptionNamed: "{name}" will be marked as completed and locked from further updates.

goals.noGoalsDescription: Set goals to track progress and align team objectives with company priorities.
goals.noMatchingGoalsDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

form.title: Create SMART Goal
form.subtitle: Define specific, measurable objectives with key results
form.goalTitlePlaceholder: e.g., Improve API response times by 50%
form.privateGoal: Private goal (only visible to you and manager)
form.disabledTooltip: Fill in goal title and target date to create

smart.title: SMART Framework
smart.subtitle: Break down your goal using the SMART framework for better clarity and tracking.
smart.specific: Specific - What exactly do you want to achieve?
smart.specificPlaceholder: e.g., Reduce average API response time from 800ms to 400ms for the /users endpoint
smart.measurable: Measurable - How will you measure progress?
smart.measurablePlaceholder: e.g., Track p95 response times in monitoring dashboard, aim for 50% reduction
smart.achievable: Achievable - Is this realistic with available resources?
smart.achievablePlaceholder: e.g., Yes, based on profiling we identified N+1 queries that can be optimized
smart.relevantPlaceholder: e.g., Improves user experience and reduces server costs by 20%

keyResults.title: Key Results (OKRs)
keyResults.subtitle: Define measurable outcomes that indicate goal completion

autoLink.title: Auto-Link GitHub Activity
autoLink.subtitle: Commits and PRs containing these keywords will be automatically linked to this goal.
autoLink.keywordsTip: Tip: Use project codes, feature names, or issue numbers for better matching

myReview.notFoundBody: We couldn't load this review. It may have been removed, or you don't have access.

deadlines.noDeadlineTooltip: No deadline configured for this phase

selfReviewSection.heading: Your self review
selfReviewSection.submittedNote: Submitted — your manager will see this when they open the cycle.
selfReviewSection.pendingNote: Reflect on your wins and growth this cycle. The manager-finalize step builds on what you write here.

form.strengthsPlaceholder: e.g. Owned the auth migration end-to-end and unblocked mobile.
form.growthPlaceholder: e.g. Want to get sharper on architectural trade-offs.
form.notePlaceholder: Free-text notes that don't fit above.
form.validationError: Add at least one strength, growth area, or note

summary.emptyNote: Your submission didn't include free-text responses.

peerSection.heading: Peer reviewers
peerSection.noneNominate: No reviewers yet. Pick teammates above to invite.
peerSection.explanationManagerAssigned: Your manager assigns peer reviewers for this cycle.
peerSection.explanationEmployeeChoice: Pick the teammates you'd like to review you.
peerSection.explanationBoth: You and your manager can both nominate reviewers.

acknowledge.heading: Your manager has completed this review.

cycles.title: Review Cycles
cycles.description: Manage performance review cycles for your workspace
cycles.noCyclesDescription: Create your first review cycle to start collecting 360° feedback from your team.

detail.notFoundBody: The review cycle you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access.

notify.buttonTitle: Resend a cycle notification to participants

confirm.startDescription: This will activate the cycle and automatically enroll all team members from your workspace. Individual reviews will be created for each participant.
confirm.advanceDescriptionTemplate: Moves this cycle from {from} → {to}. Participants will be notified and the relevant submission forms will open / close.

toasts.noEligibleRecipients: No eligible recipients for this notification
toasts.advancedSuccess: Cycle advanced to the next phase

noWorkspace.title: No Workspace Selected
noWorkspace.description: Review cycles are workspace-specific. Please create or select a workspace first.

form.title: Create Review Cycle
form.subtitle: Set up a new performance review cycle for your team
form.disabledTooltip: Fill in cycle name, start date, and end date to create
form.dateError: End date must be after start date

deadlines.title: Phase Deadlines
deadlines.subtitle: Set deadlines for each review phase. Leave blank for no deadline.

settings.title: Review Settings
settings.peerSelectionHelp: "Both" allows employees to request reviewers and managers to assign additional ones.
settings.includeGitHubDesc: Auto-import commits, PRs, and code reviews from the review period

phases.selfReviewDesc: Team members reflect on their achievements and areas for growth using structured prompts.
phases.peerReviewDesc: Collect anonymous 360° feedback from colleagues using the COIN framework.
phases.managerReviewDesc: Managers synthesize feedback and provide final ratings and development recommendations.

confirm.activateDescription: This opens the cycle and emails every enrolled developer that their review is live. Notifications can't be unsent.
confirm.advanceDescription: Moves from {from} → {to}. Participants are notified and the relevant submission forms open / close.

peerRequests.title: Peer Review Requests

detail.heading: Peer review request
detail.readOnly: This request is for another reviewer. You can view it but not act on it.
detail.readOnlyExternal: This request was sent to an external reviewer who isn't in the workspace, so there's nothing to act on from here.

pendingActions.prompt: Accept to write feedback, or decline with a short reason.

decline.title: Why are you declining?
decline.subtitle: This is shared with the requester so they know whether to reassign or follow up.
decline.placeholder: e.g. I haven't worked closely with this person this cycle.
decline.missingReason: Add a short reason so the requester knows why

form.heading: Write your feedback
form.subtitle: Add concrete examples. Strengths first, then growth areas — both surface in the manager's finalization view.
form.strengthsPlaceholder: e.g. Drove the auth migration end-to-end and unblocked the mobile team.
form.growthPlaceholder: e.g. Could share design rationale earlier in big-scope PRs.
form.notePlaceholder: Free-text notes that don't fit above.
form.validationError: Add at least one strength, growth area, or note before submitting

toasts.submitted: Peer review submitted — thanks for the feedback

detail.completedNote: Thanks — your feedback has been submitted.

selfNominate.title: Nominate peer reviewers
selfNominate.subtitle: Pick teammates you'd like to review you this cycle. Each gets a notification and can accept or decline.
selfNominate.messagePlaceholder: e.g. We collaborated on the auth migration this quarter — would love your perspective.

managerAssign.title: Invite peer reviewers
managerAssign.subtitle: Pick {min}–{max} teammates. Each gets a notification and can accept or decline.
managerAssign.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Focus on cross-team collaboration this cycle.

inviteModal.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or role
inviteModal.selectionSummary: {selected} selected · {filtered} of {eligible} {eligible, plural, one {workspace member} other {workspace members}}
inviteModal.pickAtLeast: Pick at least {count, plural, one {# reviewer} other {# reviewers}}
inviteModal.invited: Invited {count, plural, one {# reviewer} other {# reviewers}}
inviteModal.invitedWithFailures: Invited {count, plural, one {# reviewer} other {# reviewers}} — {failed} failed

peerRequests.noPeerRequestsDescription: When colleagues request your feedback for their performance review, they'll appear here.
peerRequests.aboutDescription: Peer reviews use the COIN framework for structured, constructive feedback:

manage.title: Review Management
manage.description: Monitor team reviews, track deliverables, and manage goals

actionable.bannerDescription: {count, plural, one {# item needs your attention to keep the review cycle on track} other {# items need your attention to keep the review cycle on track}}

suggestionList.allDiscarded: All suggestions discarded. Use the section below to restore any of them.

detail.notFoundBody: The review you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access.

composer.heading: Manager review
composer.subheading: Synthesize the self + peer responses above into your final write-up. Save drafts as you go; submitting finalizes the cycle for this member.
composer.strengthsPlaceholder: e.g. Owned the auth migration end-to-end. Held a clear north star and unblocked mobile when the API contract slipped.
composer.growthPlaceholder: e.g. Could surface architectural trade-offs earlier in design reviews.
composer.narrativePlaceholder: A short paragraph the developer will read. Tie the rating to specific behaviors from the strengths and growth areas above.

validation.empty: Add at least one strength, growth area, or narrative note
validation.ratingRequired: Pick an overall rating before finalizing

toasts.finalized: Review finalized — the developer will be notified

confirmFinalize.title: Finalize this review?
confirmFinalize.description: Once finalized, the developer is notified and the manager-review row locks. You won't be able to edit unless an admin reopens the cycle.

readOnly.heading: Manager review submitted
readOnly.submittedNote: Your review is locked in. The developer has been notified and will see the strengths, growth areas, and overall rating above.

locked.heading: Manager review opens in the manager-review phase
locked.note: Wait until self + peer reviews wrap and the cycle advances. You'll see the composer here once it's your turn to synthesize.

manage.allCaughtUpDesc: No pending actions at the moment. Check back later or view team overview.
manage.noSuggestionsDesc: Goal suggestions will appear here as we analyze GitHub activity and project management data from your team.
manage.aiSuggestionsDesc: Based on GitHub activity, PR patterns, and project management data. Convert to goals or discard.

statusFilter.label: Filter team members by review status
